full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50079

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50079.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 oVirt 4.5 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
